result.summary: Shufti exposes a REST verification API at https://api.shuftipro.com/ authenticated with back-office API keys, plus an OAuth 2.0-protected MCP server at https://shuftipro.com/mcp.
result.description: Shufti is an identity verification and compliance platform that provides KYC, KYB, AML screening, fraud prevention, and transaction monitoring services. It serves businesses that need to verify users or companies and monitor risk across onboarding and ongoing compliance workflows.

shufti_api_keys.label: Shufti API client ID and secret key
shufti_api_keys.setup: In the Shufti back office, open [API Keys](https://backoffice.shuftipro.com/settings/api-keys) under settings to view or generate your `client_id` and `secret_key`. Use the `client_id` as the HTTP Basic username and the `secret_key` as the password. If the secret key is lost, generate a new one from the back office; the generated key is only shown once.

shufti_mcp_oauth_client.label: Shufti AI OAuth client for MCP
shufti_mcp_oauth_client.setup: Register an OAuth client with Shufti AI at [dynamic client registration](https://ai.shuftiapps.com/register). Then send the user through the authorization flow at `https://ai.shuftiapps.com/authorize` and exchange the code at `https://ai.shuftiapps.com/token`. Supported scopes published by the authorization server are `knowledge:read`, `verification:read`, and `verification:write`. The authorization server metadata is published at [oauth-authorization-server](https://shuftipro.com/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server).
